name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: Memphis ACE Cash Express at 3858 E Shelby Dr provides quick payday and title loans with extended hours.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express stands at 3858 E Shelby Dr on Memphis's east side, a standalone payday and title loan storefront. This location serves Memphis residents Monday through Thursday from 8 AM to 6 PM, stays open until 7 PM on Friday, and opens Saturday from 9 AM to 5 PM, giving you flexible hours for your financial needs.

The Memphis store offers payday loans, title loans, and cash advances designed for immediate, short-term financial relief. Staff help guide you through the application process and explain loan terms clearly. Call 901-546-9724 to discuss rates, eligibility, or what documents you'll need before visiting.

Bring a government-issued ID, proof of income (pay stub or bank statement), and your active checking account details when you apply. ACE serves Memphis, TN residents who need fast access to funds without lengthy waiting periods or complex approval processes.
pros: Multiple service offerings including installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, and tax services
Online loan application available through internet operations channel
Physical store locations across multiple states for in-person service
Dedicated customer service with separate phone lines for general and online inquiries
Money transfer services available at store locations
Same-day or rapid funding capability implied by emergency-cash category positioning
Tax services offered in-store for additional financial planning
cons: Service availability is severely restricted by state—specific products may not be available in consumer's location
Website indicates broken store location pages and service pages, suggesting operational or technical issues
Limited transparency on APR rates, fees, and loan terms visible on sampled web pages
Recent store closures noted (New Orleans locations due to Hurricane Ida at time of page capture)
High-cost lending model typical of title and short-term installment loans carries significant APR implications
best_for: Consumers needing same-day or next-day cash who lack traditional bank access
Vehicle owners seeking title loans as collateral-based borrowing alternative
Unbanked or underbanked consumers needing check cashing and money transfer services
Individuals requiring rapid small loans under $1,000 for emergency expenses
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers experiencing genuine financial emergencies who need rapid access to small amounts of cash and don't qualify for traditional bank loans. The critical caveat is that product availability varies dramatically by state—consumers must verify through store locator that their specific needed service exists in their location, and should carefully review APR rates and fees typical of title and short-term lending before committing.
meta_description: ACE Cash Express at 3858 E Shelby Dr, Memphis, TN. Fast payday and title loans with extended Friday hours.
